brand_identity.concept: Gothic luxury tattoo artist and biotech-inspired aftercare brand (SALVIX)
brand_identity.vibe: Minimal black editorial aesthetic, high-end fashion/skincare feel (Rick Owens, Ann Demeulemeester, AESOP).
core_principles: Text-driven editorial layout: Typography creates the structure.
Clinical luxury: Merge gothic artistry with precise biotech aesthetic for the SALVIX brand.
Mobile-first: Strict grid scaling, heavy typography emphasis over imagery on smaller screens.
Brutalist minimal surfaces: No soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders and high-contrast transitions.

scale_rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none

usage: Use Cormorant Garamond for all major brand statements, emotional hooks, and artist presence.
Use Space Mono for SALVIX clinical data, ingredient lists, step numbers, and form labels.
Use Outfit for readable body paragraphs and general descriptive text.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-24, p-32. Create breathing room between editorial sections.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Tetris Grid (Asymmetric). grid-cols-1 on mobile, md:grid-cols-12. Avoid perfect symmetry.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Exposed skeleton, 1px subtle borders (border-[#1A1C1A]). No glassmorphism, no drop shadows. Raw luxury.

motion_and_interactions.global: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY. High-end fashion websites rely on momentum scrolling to feel premium.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Text color brightens, border opacity increases. No bouncy scaling. Strict, elegant fade-ins.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Slow staggered fade-in of typography. No aggressive fly-ins. Opacity from 0 to 1 over 1.2s.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveals: Images and text blocks reveal via Framer Motion with ease: [0.25, 1, 0.5, 1].

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-none). 1px border. Hover: invert background and text. Font: Space Mono or uppercase Outfit.
components.forms: Shadcn UI forms but heavily customized. Use border-b only for inputs (no full box). Minimalist clinical aesthetic.
components.accordions: For Artist Program FAQs or SALVIX details. Clean 1px top/bottom border, plus sign icon. High contrast open state.
components.marquees: Slow Editorial Ribbon. Use Space Mono, uppercase, pale text. E.g., 'SALVIX BIOTECH RECOVERY / ARTIST PROGRAM / LUXURY TATTOO'

sections_guide.hero: Massive typography. 'GOTHIC LUXURY'. Full-screen dark container. Abstract fluid texture faintly in the background.
sections_guide.tattoos_portfolio: Text-driven editorial grid. 1px borders separating content. Staggered imagery.
sections_guide.salvix_brand: Clinical shift. Introduce the muted green accent (#4A5D4E) in typography highlights or borders. Monospace stats.
sections_guide.artist_program: Structured mentorship intake. Numbered lists (Space Mono), high contrast headers.
sections_guide.contact_booking: Minimalist form. No public booking system. 'Inquire' button routing to email. Minimal input fields with bottom-borders only.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract black fluid texture for hero background or subtle overlay.

salvix_botanical.description: Dark botanical texture to represent the biotech/muted green SALVIX aftercare vibe.

editorial_fashion_1.description: Dark editorial fashion placeholder for the Gothic Artist vibe.

editorial_fashion_2.description: Secondary editorial fashion shot for layout balance.

media.treatment: Images MUST be filtered with grayscale or low saturation to match the dark aesthetic. Overlays must not exceed 50% opacity if text is placed on them.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (forms, inputs, buttons, accordions). Example: data-testid='booking-submit-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette. Do not use generic tailwind grays (slate/gray). Use the defined custom hex codes.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Space Mono' are imported via Google Fonts or similar.
Do not build a functional booking calendar. The user requested a contact/consultation form only.
Mobile-first: ensure the text scales correctly and grid items stack cleanly on mobile.
